description: This file is an HTML document for a web-based database visualizer interface. It includes structure, styles, and client-side JavaScript for browsing and viewing database tables and data.
external_methods: fetchData (fetch API used for external API calls)

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches list of databases from server and populates sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes list of databases, resetting current selection.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses database's tables list, triggering loadTables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables for selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and renders data rows from selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates HTML for the data table display.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Creates HTML for individual data cell, handling objects and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for long text or objects.
